title: PacBio (PACB) Tops on Q1 Earnings, Raises FY23 Revenue View
text: PacBio registered Q1 2023 revenues of $38.9 million, up 17.3% year-over-year, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 10.6%. PacBio delivered adjusted loss per share of 31 cents in Q1 2023, narrower than the Zacks Consensus Estimate of 33 cents. PacBio shipped 38 sequencing systems in Q1, including 32 Revio systems and 6 Sequel IIe systems, with instrument revenues reaching $20.7 million, up 32.7% year-over-year primarily from the launch of Revio at higher average selling prices. The company raised its 2023 revenue outlook to between $170-$185 million, up from the earlier guided range of $165-$180 million. The market was expecting revenue growth of 7.7% year-on-year, representing a reversal from the 4.3% decrease recorded in Q1 2022.
